artwork_unavailable_desc: This artwork is not accessible in your current session.

title_next_artwork: Next artwork by the same artist

same_artist_nav_next_caption:

ai_select_style: Select how AI should talk to you
ai_styles_error: ALERT: no rows in prompt_style (or access denied).
ai_styles_error_rls: Check Supabase RLS policies for the prompt_style table.
mediation_text_missing: No generated text for this style.
mediation_not_available_in_lang: The mediation for this artwork is not yet available in English.
default_persona_aria: Set this persona as your default preference
emotion_section_title: The emotion felt in front of this artwork
emotions_empty_error: No buttons shown: the emotions table returns no rows with icone_emotion and name_emotion.
heart_rating_subtitle:
It's not the quality of the artwork being rated,
just YOUR feeling
comment_modal_hint: It will be saved with your feedback when you tap Submit.
comment_empty: Please enter a comment before saving.
quick_feedback_missing: Pick an emotion and rate from 1 to 5 hearts to share how you feel.
quick_feedback_missing_emotion: Choose the emotion that fits you best, just below.
quick_feedback_missing_heart: Tap the hearts to rate your feeling (1 to 5).
validation_thanks:
Thank you {{name}}, it's saved.
Shall we scan another artwork's QR code?
exit_thanks_with_agency: <brand>AIMEDIArt.com</brand> and {{agency}} thank you for your visit.
exit_presented_expo: We were delighted to present this exhibition to you.
exit_see_you_soon: We hope to see you again very soon.
exit_message:
We were delighted to present this exhibition to you.
We hope to see you again very soon! It was a pleasure!
error_missing_data: Technical error: missing data for recording (visitor_id/artwork_id/emotion/note).
error_verify_insert: Uncertain insertion: unable to verify persistence in database.
error_no_row: No row found after insertion. Check that you are consulting the right Supabase project and table.
emotions_db_error: Unable to load emotions from the database.
emotions_columns_empty: The icone_emotion / name_emotion columns are empty in the database.
tts_consent_desc: The app will read the mediation text aloud. If you are in a public place, we recommend using headphones. Reading starts after your confirmation.

indoor_audio.title: Audio in the exhibition rooms
indoor_audio.courtesy_message: For everyone's comfort in the galleries, please use headphones (wired or Bluetooth). If you don't have any, turn your device volume down to the minimum before listening to the audioguide.
indoor_audio.ban_warning: If you disturb other visitors by playing sound aloud, the exhibition staff may suspend your audio access for the rest of your visit.
indoor_audio.ban_message: Audio suspended by the museum. Out of respect for the quiet of the exhibition, speaker playback is not allowed. Please plug in your headphones and contact the front desk to restore your access.

diary.title: My travel diary
diary.subtitle: Your emotions, your artworks, your journey
diary.error_load: Unable to load your diary right now.
diary.empty_desc: Scan an artwork and share how you feel to fill the first page.
diary.share_text: My emotional travel diary with AIMEDIArt
diary.share_expired_desc: This diary is no longer available via this link. Ask the sender for a new one.
diary.community_same_prefix: You felt {{emotion}} in front of this artwork?
diary.community_percentage: {{percent}}% of other visitors felt the same
diary.community_no_same_emotion: No other visitor mentioned this emotion.
diary.community_first: You are among the first to feel {{emotion}} in front of this artwork — your emotion matters!
diary.exit_offer: Would you like to access your emotional travel diary?
diary.exit_offer_gift: We are pleased to offer you your <emphasis>EMOTIONAL TRAVEL DIARY</emphasis> as a souvenir of your visit, which you can <underline>share with your friends.</underline>
diary.registration_desc_line1: Let's get to know each other first.
diary.registration_desc_line2: This information helps us keep improving.
diary.registration_preview_swipe_hint: Flip through the pages: cover, statistics and your artworks.
diary.registration_missing_fields: Please fill in all required fields.
diary.registration_password_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.
diary.registration_password_mismatch: The two passwords do not match.
diary.registration_auth_error: Invalid session. Please sign in again.

scanner.qr_not_recognized_desc: Use the QR code of an artwork (label or catalog), well centered and lit.
scanner.camera_blocked_https: Camera blocked: open this page over HTTPS (e.g. an ngrok URL) then try again.
scanner.camera_denied: Camera access denied. Allow the camera to scan artworks.
scanner.camera_not_found: No camera detected on this device.
scanner.camera_in_use: The webcam is being used by another application. Close it then try again.
scanner.camera_unavailable: Camera unavailable right now. Try again in a moment.
scanner.torch_failed: The flashlight could not be turned on on this device.
scanner.qr_unreadable_image: QR unreadable on this image. Try a sharper or closer photo.
scanner.import_qr_photo: Import a photo of the QR
scanner.native_qr_note: Native QR reading (like the Windows Camera app)
scanner.start_visit_title: Well done! The visit now begins.
scanner.start_visit_desc: Just scan the QR codes placed next to the exhibited artworks.
scanner.tip_line1: Get closer to the QR code
scanner.tip_line2: and/or turn on the light on your smartphone
scanner.exit_thanks_with_agency: <brand>AIMEDIArt.com</brand> and {{agency}} thank you for your visit.
scanner.exit_see_you: We hope to see you again very soon!

scan_welcome.pseudo_empty_server: Empty nickname returned by the server.
scan_welcome.visitor_id_unavailable: Visitor ID unavailable. Reload the page.
scan_welcome.pseudo_choose: Choose a nickname or regenerate one.
scan_welcome.pseudo_confirm_error: Error while saving the nickname. Try again or continue from the scanner.
scan_welcome.pseudo_dialog_desc: A random suggestion (common noun + qualifier + 3 digits) — you can edit it before continuing.
scan_welcome.register_cta: Sign up for the full experience
scan_welcome.footer_register:
Your registration lets you

personalize

your entire exhibition journey.
